title: Ambuja Cements Capital India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Ambuja Cements Capital India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Ambuja Cements Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Ambuja Cements Capital India:
Ambuja Cements Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambuja Cements Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
